views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's care summary, number of unique plants tended, green-thumb streak counter, plants overdue for watering, and a prominent quick-add FAB for logging care events

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick care logging sheet with plant name autocomplete from previous entries, care type selector with icons, conditional water amount picker, health score slider, soil moisture check, location tag, and optional notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological care log grouped by date with plant name badges, care type icons, and health score indicators; filterable by individual plant or care type

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly care frequency bar chart, monthly health score trend line per plant, care type distribution pie breakdown, location-based health comparison, and contextual insight cards

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todaysCareCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of care events logged today across all plants

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniquePlantsToday
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct plant names cared for today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalUniquePlants
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of distinct plant names across all historical entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one care event logged, ending today or yesterday

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCareSessions
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total care events logged during the current Mon–Sun week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendPercent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in weekly care events vs the previous week; positive means more activity

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageHealthScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean health score across all entries from the last 30 days, scale 1.0–5.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: healthTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Difference between this month's average health score and last month's; positive means improving

viewModelComputedProperties.name: careTypeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Frequency distribution of each care type in the last 30 days, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostActivePlant
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Name of the plant with the most care events in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: plantsDueForWater
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Names of plants whose most recent watering event was 7+ days ago

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily care goal achieved today (0.0 to 1.0, capped at 1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (dayLabel, careCount) tuples for each day of the current week for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyHealthChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (weekLabel, avgHealthScore) tuples for each week of the current month for line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: locationDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of unique plants per location, useful for pie or bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of contextual insight strings computed from care patterns, overdue plants, health trends, and streaks

dailyGoal.description: Target number of plant care events per day; encourages daily check-ins with all plants. Adjustable by user.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least 1 care event of any type is logged. The streak increments for each consecutive active day and resets to 0 when a day passes with zero events.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current week total care sessions vs previous week for activity trend. Track rolling 30-day average health score vs prior 30 days. Flag individual plants whose last 3 health scores form a declining sequence. Compute per-location average health to identify problem areas.
insights: Thirsty plants: list plants not watered in 7+ days with their last watering date and location
Health declining: flag plants whose last 3 recorded health scores show a consistent downward trend (e.g. 4→3→2)
Fertilize reminder: highlight plants that haven't received fertilizer in 30+ days
Streak milestone: celebration messages at 7, 14, 30, 60, and 90 consecutive active care days
Seasonal tip: suggest reducing watering frequency Nov–Feb and increasing Jun–Aug based on calendar month
Location health: compare average health scores across locations to identify spots that may need better light or humidity
Neglect alert: identify plants with fewer than 2 care events in the past 30 days compared to the user's average
Green thumb score: weekly composite score (0–100) based on streak, overdue count, average health, and care consistency
